text.title: Grafana — Basics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on viewer choice + maintenance horizon.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: codify-dashboards-and-alerts
step.action: Migrate dashboards to JSON/Grafonnet; author alert rules as YAML.

step.name: structure-folders-and-rbac
step.action: Allocate folders per team with RBAC.

step.name: lock-public-policy-validate
step.action: Disable public links by default; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
